summary: Ratings & Experience Analytics module (iteration 84) tested - All backend APIs working 100%. Frontend dashboard loads correctly at /app/admin/user-analytics. Mandatory feedback for 1-2 star ratings enforced correctly.

issues: Some filter dropdowns appear collapsed/cut off at the top, may need adjustment for better visibility

critical_code_review_comments: Mandatory feedback for 1-2 star ratings (A3) is correctly enforced on backend - returns 400 if reason_type missing
When reason_type is 'other', comment is required - properly validated
All admin endpoints properly protected with get_admin_user dependency
CSV export works correctly with proper content-type and disposition headers
Session tracking correctly captures device type, platform, browser from user-agent
Privacy-safe location tracking uses IP hashing with salt

success_rate.backend: 100% (31 passed, 1 skipped due to rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (dashboard loads, all tabs visible, data displaying)

seed_data_creation: Created test ratings with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Analytics & Ratings module fully functional. Backend endpoints at /api/admin/user-analytics/* for admin and /api/user-analytics/* for user operations. Test data created with TEST_ prefixes in ratings collection.

A1_dashboard_rating_distributions.notes: Dashboard shows Total Ratings, Avg Rating, NPS Score, Low Ratings, Rating Distribution chart

A2_privacy_safe_location_tracking.notes: Session tracking captures device_type, platform, browser, approx_location from IP

A3_mandatory_feedback_low_ratings.notes: 1-2 star ratings without reason_type return 400 error. 'other' reason requires comment.

A4_event_tracking_telemetry.notes: Feature events tracked with feature_key, event_type, status, latency_ms, error_code

A6_csv_export.notes: CSV export returns proper text/csv with attachment disposition
